title: Whats the diference between the 6 disc and 7 disc set
display_title: Whats the diference between the 6 disc and 7 disc set
wikitext:
[]: What's the diference between the 6 disc and 7 disc set...             Quote Post by berto » Mon Aug 23, 2010 7:04 am Of the Platinum DVDs? I was looking around on ebay and saw a few cheap ones but I don't know what the diference is and I can't find a page with descriptions of ether. No planing on buying yet, but when I do I want to know which is the best one to have.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Mon Aug 23, 2010 7:57 am 7 disc set has all the extras that came with the individually-released platinum DVDs. It also has a nifty tin case, if you're into that. Only worthwhile extras on there are some storyboards, but if you don't care about that then you might as well just get whichever one is cheaper. It's the same video/audio/subs regardless of which Platinum set you get.

[]:             Quote Post by berto » Mon Aug 23, 2010 5:04 pm So what your saying is that the 6 disc version just got rid of some un interesting special features.? cool, thanks
